who: paralegals in law firms processing 5–15 legal briefs per month
offer: For paralegals in law firms processing 5–15 legal briefs per month, manual research causes delays in case preparation. We provide automated summaries instead of manual research and drafting.
problem: Time-consuming legal research and brief generation
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for paralegals seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on legal workflows
DM outreach to paralegals with demo video
Participate in forums where paralegals share tools
try_it: Let users try case law summaries on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with a clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 brief interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for reuse
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing case data
Enable one-click export of summary reports
Streamline onboarding process for new users
